recommendations.title: Case Closed: Countdown to Heaven
recommendations.overview: As a pair of towers in Tokyo are being prepared for their grand opening, there is a series of murders of people connected to the towers. Conan suspects that the mysterious Syndicate may also be involved.

recommendations.title: Nimona
recommendations.genres: Animation, Family, Adventure, Fantasy, Comedy, Action, Drama, Science Fiction
recommendations.overview: A knight framed for a tragic crime teams with a scrappy, shape-shifting teen to prove his innocence.

recommendations.title: Detective Conan: The Raven Chaser

recommendations.title: Detective Conan: Dimensional Sniper

recommendations.title: Detective Conan: The Lost Ship in the Sky

recommendations.title: Murder Most Foul
recommendations.overview: A murderer is brought to court and only Miss Marple is unconvinced of his innocence. Once again she begins her own investigation.

recommendations.title: Murphy's Law
recommendations.overview: A tough police detective escapes from custody after being framed and arrested for the murder of his ex-wife, and must now find the real killer and prove his innocence.
